numerical_constraints.name: Maximale bouwhoogte 4 bouwlagen
numerical_constraints.condition: Zone aangeduid als maximaal 4 bouwlagen op de maximale bouwhoogte kaart

reasons: Clearly stated in the map legend under 'Maximale bouwhoogte'.
Document type is 'other' (beeldkwaliteitplan), which is informative/guiding rather than legally binding regels.
Unit 'bouwlagen' is stated explicitly in the legend text.

numerical_constraints.notes: Shown on a map legend for 'Maximale bouwhoogte' in the Beeldkwaliteitplan. Two height zones are distinguished: max 4 and max 6 bouwlagen.

numerical_constraints.name: 60 meter contour hoogbouwaccent
numerical_constraints.condition: Ter plaatse van aangeduide zoeklocaties hoogbouwaccenten

reasons: The term '60 meter contour' appears in the legend of the 'Zoeklocaties hoogbouwaccenten' map.
It is unclear whether 60m refers to a height limit or a spatial radius/buffer around existing towers.
Document is a beeldkwaliteitplan (guiding, not binding).
No explicit binding rule text accompanies the legend.

numerical_constraints.notes: The right-hand map shows 'Zoeklocaties hoogbouwaccenten' with a 60 meter contour and existing tower reference. This suggests high-rise accent locations are identified within a 60m radius zone of existing towers.

narrative_constraints.statement: Specific search locations ('zoeklocaties') for high-rise accents ('hoogbouwaccenten') are identified on the plan, associated with a 60-metre contour around existing towers. These locations are designated for potential taller accent buildings within the Nieuw Legmeer development.

provenance.quoted_text:

reasons: Clearly depicted on the map with its own legend.
Document is a beeldkwaliteitplan, which is guiding rather than legally binding.
The exact nature of 'zoeklocaties' implies flexibility/search areas rather than fixed designations.
